text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our day off, Winning Ticket invites me to
watch a race together.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Watching broadcasts in my room is great too, but
there's something special about the atmosphere
at a racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So let's watch an exciting race today and get
really fired up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A hundred meters to go! And here comes number
twelve from the outside! She's closing in... she's
almost got them... she takes the win!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! That was a great race! So awesoooome!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That Umamusume was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I heard her trainer is retiring, so I bet she wanted
to send them off with a win.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
So that's why she was so intense...
Congratulations! You did great out there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wooow! She won the race for her trainer! Isn't
that the most beautiful thing?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Didja hear that just now, Trainer?! It's gotta be
the sweetest thing ever! Waaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! For real!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look! The winner's crying... Nooo, you'll make
me start bawling again!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I... wanna run... sniff... a race full of that much passion tooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the midst of all her tears, Winning Ticket finds
new resolution.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But contrary to her positive spirit, her growth still
shows little progress...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm not even close to Taishin and Hayahide's
times... Uuughhh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: They must be working even harder than I thought!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, Trainer! Can I practice a little longer
today again?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But at this rate, I'll be left behind! I won't be able
to run an exciting race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide
have shown astonishing progress recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But forcing herself to train an unhealthy amount
isn't going to help close that gap. So there's only
one thing to do...
choice_data_list: Save that motivation for tomorrow's session!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! I'm hitting the same problem as
before the Derby—getting too desperate for
results!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Can't rush! Need to focus! I need STRONG
motivation!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll break my record tomorrow so I can show
everyone an unforgettable race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, that's it for today! Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no issue with Ticket's motivation, nor with
the content of her practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why we don't need to rush. Sometimes it
takes time for hard work to pay off, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I do have to hope she'll start gaining
ground soon...
